MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Continued To Aug-27-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Giovanna A. Ferrari, Esq. of SEYFARTH SHAW (415-397-2823), appearing for cross-complainants / moving parties Malibu Pier Partners, LLC and Alexander Leff
Victor M. Sher, Esq. of SHER LEFF (415-398-8300) appearing for cross-complainants / moving parties Malibu Pier Partners, LLC and Alexander Leff
David A. Cohn, Esq. of KESLUK & SILVERSTEIN (310-273-3180), appearing for cross-defendant/ opposing party Malimo's, A California Limited Liability Co.

Ruling:
CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ALEXANDER LEFF AND MALIBU PIER PARTNERS LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
PRIOR TO THE HEARING, THE COURT RECEIVES A COPY OF THE SADOSKY DECLARATION AND HAS REVIEWED DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS.
HEARING HELD AND MATTER ARGUED. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ALEXANDER LEFF AND MALIBU PIER PARTNERS LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 27, 2008 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. The parties are ordered to submit simultaneous briefs on (1) Cite the authorities with 3 cases regarding Promissory Estoppel; (2) Regarding the issus of Breach of Contract with the 9406 agreement plus the related e-mail (Exh. #37 & #38): (a) Do these documents constitute a written agreement? (b) Under what circumstances must the questions be presented to the jury? (c) Question of Quantum Merit according to proof. The opening briefs are due on 8/19 and reply briefs on 8/22. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/VC)
=(302/PJM/VC)
